data.title: Broker: optional output redaction before returning tool results to the model

data.body: Deferred TODO at src/navi/broker.py:177 ('optional output redaction before returning to the model', spec 6.2). Today the broker returns tool results to the model verbatim. Redaction would scrub sensitive content (credential/PII-shaped tokens -- can reuse the _egress_check pattern lists) from tool OUTPUT before it re-enters the model context, reducing the chance the model then echoes it outbound. Decide: redact-in-place vs deny, and whether redaction events get traced. Lower priority than inbound egress (NAVI-6 already guards the outbound channel). backlog.
